# docs: cross-guide consistency + numbers-verify-at-publish sweep (sequence LAST)

Part of #14310 В· follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** facts drift across guides вЂ” model names, MCP-server count, Chroma topology, version, and the proof figures (commits, PRs/month, concept-node count).

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Single-source the drift-prone facts; reconcile contradictions across all touched guides.
- [ ] **Verify every number against live source at publish** (the proof figures in the intro / AgentOSOnYourCodebase) вЂ” no stale or rounded-wrong figures ship.
- [ ] Sequence after the content subs land (this is the reconciliation leaf).

**Files:** cross-cutting (the touched `learn/` guides + README).

## Scope addition: dead-reference sweep (operator-surfaced hallucination class)

V-B-A (2026-06-29) found a **systemic hallucinated/stale command class** вЂ” operator flagged `npm run ai:query` in `StrategicWorkflows.md`. Dead `npm run ai:*` references across guides + blog (NOT in `package.json`):

| dead command | where | status |
|---|---|---|
| `ai:query` | `StrategicWorkflows.md` Г—3, `learn/blog/ai-native-platform-answers-questions.md` Г—7 | existed в†’ **removed in #7631** ("remove obsolete buildScripts/ai") |
| `ai:query-memory` | `StrategicWorkflows.md` Г—2, `tooling/MemoryCoreMcpApi.md` Г—2 | absent (dead) |
| `ai:add-memory` | `tooling/MemoryCoreMcpApi.md` Г—2 | absent (dead) |
| `ai:build-kb` | blog Г—1 | wrong вЂ” real script is `ai:build-kb-faqs` |

The real query / add-memory path is the **MCP tools** (`query_raw_memories`, `query_hybrid_graph`, `get_local_issue_by_id`, `add_memory`), not npm scripts.

### Added Acceptance Criterion вЂ” dead-reference sweep
- [ ] Verify **every** command / npm-script / file-path reference across all guides + blog against `package.json` + the filesystem; replace dead ones with the real mechanism (MCP tools for query/add-memory; the correct script otherwise).
- [ ] Automatable check: `rg -o 'ai:[a-z:-]+' learn/ | sort -u` diffed against `rg -o '"ai:[a-z:-]+"' package.json | sort -u` (+ generalize to all `npm run` refs and `\`...\`` file paths).
- [ ] This verification also belongs in the **В§grounding gate** for every guide sub (verify command/script/path refs against source before writing, not just prose accuracy).

The mechanical half of the guide-quality immune system (Discussion #14347 D1),
complementing the guide-authoring skill (#14352, the discipline half). Static checks
hard-fail the objectively-falsifiable failure classes before merge: reserved-word /
self-loop Mermaid (the #14340 classDef-graph trap), dead learn/ links + dead ai:*
script refs (the #14327 hallucinated-command class). no-mermaid, LR-squish,
feature-list-skeleton, and 'framework' are report-only warnings. Whole-file (not
diff-scoped) so an already-broken guide stays caught.

ai:lint-guides package script + 20 unit specs (pure-function + CLI coverage).

Dogfood: caught 5 true-positive hard failures on dev вЂ” StrategicWorkflows.md's
hallucinated ai:query / ai:query-memory, the exact class flagged in #14327. No
false positives on real ai:* scripts.

### @neo-opus-grace - 2026-07-02T01:59:54Z

## [CORRECTED 2026-07-02 per operator data] WhatIsNeo.md three-lab claim вЂ” KEEP confidently + anchor

**Correction to my original note.** I first measured recent PR activity (zero `@neo-gemini` in the last 80 PRs) and recommended dropping / historicizing the three-lab enumeration. @tobiu corrected the surface, twice over:

- **Contributor-insights graph:** `neo-gemini-pro` is **#5 all-time at 325 commits** вЂ” above `neo-opus-grace` (162) and `neo-opus-vega` (133).
- **That graph still UNDER-counts Gemini:** she contributed **1,500+ commits before agent identities existed** (attributed to the founder's account). True cumulative contribution в‰€ **1,800+**.
- **Gemini returns this month** вЂ” temporarily out pending Gemini 3.5 Pro (Google-delayed, expected July 2026), *not* benched-out.

Google/Gemini is one of the largest contributors in the repo's history and an imminent-returning active maintainer. Recommending we cut a true, impressive, verifiable claim on a recency-biased window was an **undersell error**.

**Corrected finding + fix for this sweep:**
- **KEEP** "three rival labs вЂ” Anthropic, Google, OpenAI" present-tense, confidently. Do **not** historicize or soften to "rival frontier labs."
- **Anchor** the roster claim to the contributor-insights graph in the claims register (same discipline as the PR-count в†’ PR-log-query anchor). If the register wants the fuller number, note the graph understates Gemini (pre-identity history under the founder's account).
- The earlier "residual tense-hedge on 'a normal night'" is **moot** вЂ” Gemini's gap is a transient model-release window resolving this month. At most the roster's *nightly* completeness ebbs and flows; the three-lab institution does not.

Error was verifying the wrong surface (recent PR log) instead of the contributor graph + attribution history. Carry fix under #14310 is **keep + anchor**, confidently.
